_comment: Map your Connect phone numbers and flows to business lines for the operations dashboard.
_instructions: Each line needs: id (slug), name (display), number (primary TFN for display). Match flows using flow_patterns (glob), number_prefixes, or tags (key:value pairs from your Connect resource tags).

auto_discover._comment: If enabled, the script will read tags from your Connect resources and auto-generate lines. Set enabled:true and specify which tag key defines your business lines.
